plan: 使用Bowtie2进行参考基因组的索引构建：Bowtie2-build 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\data\Reference.fasta' 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\data\Reference'

使用Bowtie2将配对端测序数据比对到参考基因组：Bowtie2 -x 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\data\Reference' -1 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\data\SRR1234567_R1.fastq.gz' -2 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\data\SRR1234567_R2.fastq.gz' -S 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\alignment.sam'

使用SAMtools将SAM格式的比对结果转换为BAM格式：SAMtools view -bS 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\alignment.sam' > 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\alignment.bam'
使用SAMtools索引排序后的BAM文件：SAMtools index 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\sorted_alignment.bam'

使用Picard MarkDuplicates移除PCR重复：Picard MarkDuplicates I='C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\sorted_alignment.bam' O='C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\deduped_alignment.bam' M='C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\duplicate_metrics.txt'

使用SAMtools将去重后的BAM文件转换为FASTQ格式：SAMtools bam2fq 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\deduped_alignment.bam' > 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\deduped_reads.fq'

使用Quast评估组装结果的质量：Quast.py -o 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\quast_output' 'C:\Users\32181\.openclaw\workspace\autoba-modern\backend\output\task_b419a231\output\spades_output\scaffolds.fasta'
